compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Prima Klima 125L AC, Vents TT 150, Rhino Pro 125
compatible_devices.notes: TRIAC phase-cut speed control; 2 independent Schuko outlets (left = exhaust fan, right = intake fan); regulates speed based on temperature AND negative pressure (vacuum); negative pressure setpoint adjustable 50-100%; minimum fan speed adjustable 20-100%; temperature setpoint 20-30 °C; 4 m digital temp probe; IP54; model variants: 2x1A, 2x3A, 2x5A, 2x10A; can operate with single exhaust fan if intake air is passive; NOT compatible with EC fans; NOT compatible with Soler & Palau Silent TD series
